title: Rbw
compiled_truth: Rbw is an external contact at [Mrwassoc](companies/mrwassoc). Over the corpus period (1999-09-24 to 2001-08-01), Rbw sent 13 and received 311 emails, totalling 324 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (13), [Smara](people/smara) (3), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (2), [Bcragg](people/bcragg-gmssr) (2), [Mday](people/mday-gmssr) (2).
